name: multi-agent-copilot
description: Graph-based multi-agent system with parallel domain coders inside the Copilot chat panel

chatParticipants.name: team
chatParticipants.description: A graph-based multi-agent system that routes your request through specialized agents (planner, coder, reviewer).

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Create a step-by-step plan for a task

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review code for bugs, style, and improvements

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate and run tests for your code

commands.name: build
commands.description: Spawn parallel domain coders to build a multi-file project

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run go:build
scripts.go:build:all: cd src/go-worker && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o ../../out/go-worker-darwin-arm64 . && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../../out/go-worker-darwin-amd64 . && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../../out/go-worker-linux-amd64 . && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o ../../out/go-worker-windows-amd64.exe .
